videos.title: Learn HTML Forms In 25 Minutes
videos.description: Comprehensive overview of HTML forms including all input element types, attributes, and best practices for form creation.

videos.title: HTML Forms and Input Elements - Full Stack Foundations
videos.description: In-depth tutorial covering HTML form structure, input elements, labels, buttons, and form submission with practical examples.

videos.title: HTML Input Types You Should Know
videos.description: A tour of all HTML5 input types with styling tips, accessibility considerations, and when to use each type.

videos.title: Styling HTML Forms with CSS
videos.description: Learn how to style HTML form inputs with modern CSS including focus states, transitions, and cross-browser consistency.

videos.title: Form Validation with JavaScript
videos.description: Client-side form validation using JavaScript including the Constraint Validation API, custom error messages, and real-time validation.
